steps.title: Find the key phrase describing the zoo
steps.content: ”Spread over numberless acres” tells us the zoo covers a large area. The phrase “over numberless acres” makes clear we're talking about the zoo's physical extent or coverage.

steps.title: Pick the word that means coverage across an area
steps.content: ”Extended” directly fits how the zoo stretches or spreads across the acres. Hidden, Discussed, and Coated don't express this spatial distribution. That matches choice C — C is correct.
